case_title: KENNEY, MAUREEN B. vs. BAIARD, DOMINIQUE AKA DOMINIQUE M. BIARD et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BAIARD, DOMINIQUE AKA DOMINIQUE M. BIARD
